criteriaResults.evidence: `from whisperdeep import events` exits 0. Module exports EventBus class, Event dataclass (frozen), and EventType enum + EVENT_TYPES tuple. EventBus has `publish` (alias `emit`) and `subscribe` (alias `on`) methods. See whisperdeep/events.py:48-155.

Constructed Event(type='entered_room', payload={'room_id':3}, turn=12, floor=0); all fields equal expected values. Mutating `event.turn = 99` raises FrozenInstanceError (events.py:48 dataclass(frozen=True)).

Subscribed A->'killed_monster', B->'entered_room', C->'*'. After publishing killed_monster: A=1,B=0,C=1. After publishing entered_room: A=1,B=1,C=2. publish() at events.py:111-128 dispatches type-specific subs first then wildcard.
EVENT_TYPES tuple = ('run_started','run_ended','entered_room','killed_monster','low_hp','found_item','descended'). Iterable. EventType Enum also exposed. events.py:22-41.

`from whisperdeep.whisperer import Whisperer` exits 0. Constructor accepts adapter (positional, required), bus, budget, seed, per_turn_cap, fallback_adapter. Exposes `whispers` list attribute and `get_whispers()` method. whisperer.py:63-136.

`from whisperdeep.llm import LLMAdapter, NullAdapter, OfflineAdapter` exits 0. LLMAdapter is ABC; instantiating raises TypeError. NullAdapter.complete returns AdapterResult(text='', tokens=0). OfflineAdapter.complete returns AdapterResult with non-empty text and integer tokens. AdapterResult dataclass has text + tokens + adapter_name. llm.py:53-211.

AnthropicAdapter() with no env var raises LLMUnavailable: 'AnthropicAdapter: missing API key; set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' on complete(). Module imports cleanly even without anthropic SDK (soft import inside complete()). llm.py:219-277.

prose_pool.json has 9 distinct entries for each of 7 canonical event types (63 total, > 56 threshold). OfflineAdapter selects from per-type pool when event_type is hinted; returns non-empty strings. Verified per event type: each yields 9 distinct entries.

OfflineAdapter(seed=42) and OfflineAdapter(seed=42) produce identical sequences for ['entered_room','killed_monster','entered_room','low_hp','descended']. seed=43 produces a strictly different sequence in >=1 position. Each adapter owns its own random.Random instance (llm.py:175).

Whisperer with OfflineAdapter(seed=1) attached to bus. Publishing Event(type='killed_monster', turn=5, floor=0) yields whispers length 1; whisper has non-empty text, source_event_type='killed_monster', source_turn=5, source_floor=0, adapter_name='offline', fallback boolean. After two more events, whispers length is 3.

Whisperer with budget=30 and OfflineAdapter(tokens_per_call=20) on different turns. Whispers 0,1 fallback=False (cumulative tokens 20, 40). Once budget_exhausted, whispers 2,3,4 fallback=True. tokens_used stops at 40 (one call past the cap, then fallback). Whispers continue producing non-empty text. whisperer.py:185-221.

FlakyAdapter raises RuntimeError on every call. Publishing event does not propagate; Whisperer.failure_count incremented to 1; whisper.fallback=True with non-empty text and error_reason='RuntimeError: boom'. Second event produces a second whisper (loop not stuck). Wrapped in try/except at whisperer.py:148-167 + 199-204.

Game.from_seed(seed=1, whisperer=True): game.events is EventBus, game.whisperer is Whisperer, whispers[0].source_event_type == 'run_started'. After teleport to downstairs and game.descend(): new whisper appended with source_event_type=='descended'. Game.from_seed(seed=1, whisperer=False) yields events=None, whisperer=None (clean opt-out). game.py:51-86, 125-148.

`python -m whisperdeep --help` shows --whisperer {offline,null,anthropic,openai} (default offline), --no-whisperer, --whisper-budget, --dump-whispers. Default headless run exits 0. --no-whisperer exits 0. --whisperer null produces only the banner '# whisperer: null' and the dungeon grid; no prose strings appear. Banner reports adapter.

Captured stdout from `--seed 1 --headless --no-whisperer` (A) and `--seed 1 --headless` (B). Stripped leading '# whisperer: offline' line from B; remaining bytes equal A exactly (`diff` returns 0). No whisper prose appears inside the dungeon glyph grid.

`--seed 5 --dump-whispers w1.json` and `--seed 5 --dump-whispers w2.json` in two separate processes produce identical JSON arrays (text + source_event_type + turn + floor all equal). `--seed 6` produces a different first-element text. Each dumped whisper has fallback boolean and adapter_name.

tests/test_sprint07.py contains no top-level imports of requests/httpx/urllib.request/anthropic/openai/socket. `pytest tests/` with no API keys passes 68/68. Real-provider tests use monkeypatch to clear env vars and assert LLMUnavailable. OfflineAdapter and NullAdapter source contain zero references to network libraries (verified via grep — only 'anthropic'/'openai' mentions are inside soft-import guards in their respective adapter classes).

Full pytest suite: 68 passed. `python -m whisperdeep --seed 1 --headless` exits 0 with non-empty frame. Two consecutive runs produce byte-identical dungeon grids. seed 1 vs seed 2 produce different grids. Glyphs '#','.','+','>','@' appear in seed-1 frame; '<' is on floors 1+ (consistent with sprint-2 evaluation that already accepted this — only downstairs are present on floor 0).

tests/test_sprint07.py contains 24 test_* functions (>= 12 required). Coverage maps: bus pub/sub (test_subscribers_receive_targeted_and_wildcard_events_in_order), event-type registry (test_canonical_event_types_exposed_and_iterable), event immutability (test_event_immutability_and_required_fields), offline pool size (test_offline_pool_has_at_least_eight_distinct_entries_per_event_type), offline determinism (test_offline_adapter_determinism...), auto-whisper (test_whisperer_produces_whispers_from_bus_with_full_metadata), budget cap (test_budget_exhaustion_forces_fallback...), failure resilience (test_flaky_adapter_does_not_crash_event_loop), Game wiring (test_game_wiring_publishes_run_started_and_descended), real-provider missing key (test_real_provider_adapter_raises_llm_unavailable_without_key), dump determinism (test_whisper_dump_is_deterministic_across_processes), no-network (test_no_network_imports_in_offline_or_null_adapter_source + test_pytest_suite_does_not_import_network_modules_at_top_level). All 24 pass.

docs/whisperdeep.md contains: section enumerating 7 canonical event types (lines 148-158), adapter abstraction with Null/Offline/Anthropic/OpenAI table (lines 164-180), token-budget guardrail and fallback degrade (lines 214-227), CLI flag table for --whisperer/--no-whisperer/--whisper-budget/--dump-whispers (lines 121-124), env vars ANTHROPIC_API_KEY/OPENAI_API_KEY (lines 179-180), explicit Sprint-7-is-plumbing-only note (lines 13-14, 134-137).

AST scan: whisperdeep/llm.py imports only ['__future__','abc','dataclasses','pathlib','typing'] — no game/world/floor/render imports. whisperdeep/events.py imports only ['__future__','dataclasses','enum','typing'] — no whisperer or llm imports. whisperdeep/whisperer.py imports events and llm but not concrete real-provider classes (uses LLMAdapter, OfflineAdapter only). whisperdeep/game.py imports events but not whisperer or llm at module top; the factory module is imported lazily inside Game.from_seed (game.py:80) — clean layering.

CountingAdapter wired to Whisperer with default per_turn_cap=2. Publishing 50 events of type 'entered_room' on turn=1 yielded counter.calls=2 and len(whisperer.whispers)=2 (capped at DEFAULT_PER_TURN_CAP=2). whisperer.py:171-175 increments per-turn counter and drops excess events.

results.evidence: Game.from_seed factory, deterministic generation, glyph contract preserved. Existing test_game.py and test_generator.py pass (part of 68/68).

World/Floor/Generator generate >=3 floors deterministically. Headless CLI prints frame for --seed 1. Two runs of same seed produce byte-identical grids. Different seeds produce different grids. Sprint-2 glyphs (#, ., +, <, >, @) all rendered (< on floor>=1).

holisticScores.rationale: All 22 contract criteria pass cleanly with concrete evidence. The implementation is well-layered (events module is upstream; LLM module has no game-side imports; whisperer imports only events and the adapter ABC; concrete real-provider adapters are wired by a factory module imported lazily by Game). The OfflineAdapter is deterministic, the budget guardrail behaves correctly under both budget-exhausted and adapter-failure paths, the per-turn cap throttles spammy events, and the run is byte-identical to pre-Whisperer when stripping the opt-in banner line. 24 new pytest tests cover every C19 scenario; 68/68 total tests pass with no API keys. Documentation enumerates all 7 event types, the adapter abstraction, the budget mechanism, the new CLI flags, the env vars used, and explicitly states Sprint 7 is plumbing-only. Minor observations (not blocking): the OfflineAdapter falls back to a flat union when an unrecognized event_type hint is passed (acceptable; documented behavior is per-pool selection on hint match).
